title: tanarius baillonianus
intro: Tanarius baillonianus, also known as Tanacetum baillonianum, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which are primarily attributed to its essential oils, particularly camphor and borneol. The health benefits of Tanarius baillonianus include its use as an anti-inflammatory agent, a digestive aid, and a natural antiseptic to treat minor wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Tanarius baillonianus include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
